label: Grow Guide — clearer Add to Calendar
items: Visible "When" line on each Grow Guide section — shows the exact months the AI thinks the task should happen (e.g. "Mar – May"). Now you know what window will be used before you tap Add.
Sheet stays open with a green ✓ "N tasks added to your calendar" for a moment after saving, instead of closing silently. No more accidental double-adds.
Tightened the AI prompt so the timing always lands in the structured month field, not hidden in the description text. Refresh a guide to pull the new format.
